**[Hypoxia synergizes cGAS-STING activation and AKT1 phosphorylation to drive pulmonary inflammation in one-lung ventilation: therapeutic attenuation by RU.521 and MK2206](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12950-026-00498-6)** *(from Pulmonology/anesthesiology (one-lung ventilation, acute lung injury))*

**[STING inhibition and BD1-selective BET blockade limit ischemia-reperfusion-induced hepatic tissue remodeling by suppressing pro-inflammasome signaling.](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tice.2026.103387)** *(from Hepatology/surgery (ischemia-reperfusion injury))*
